message:
✨ Always show repo list in error state for GitHub Activity card

- Display saved repos list prominently even when API fails
- Current (stale) repo highlighted in yellow with warning icon
- Users can switch repos without opening settings panel
- Simplified "+" button to add new repos
- More compact error message layout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
